# Growth Mindset Parenting

> Practical, plainspoken parenting advice for parents of tweens and middle schoolers. By Sean Kane — 14-year middle school English teacher (Austin, TX) and father of three sons.

Sean's approach applies classroom-tested teaching frameworks to home parenting. His content focuses on the developmental science of emerging adolescence — growth mindset, emotional regulation, and scaffolded independence. Influenced by Dr. David Yeager (growth mindset research), Daniel Siegel (adolescent neurobiology), and Lisa Damour (adolescent psychology).

## Core Content

- [The Six Middle Skills](https://growthmindsetparenting.com/skills/): Six classroom-tested skills with scripts and cadences — Emotional Literacy, Resilience, Reflection, Relationship, Autonomy, Communication
- [Writing Archive](https://growthmindsetparenting.com/writing/): Essay-format newsletter covering parenting, emotional regulation, middle school transition, co-parenting, and raising boys
- [Middle Skills Course](https://growthmindsetparenting.com/course/): A self-paced course on the six skills middle schoolers are building and how parents teach them
- [About Sean Kane](https://growthmindsetparenting.com/about/): Sean's background, teaching methodology, influences, and contact

## Optional

- [RSS Feed](https://growthmindsetparenting.com/feed.xml): Full-text RSS feed of all published letters
